adjustment.zh: 稍高水温或稍细研磨;粉水比略高(1:16-1:17)
adjustment.en: slightly higher temp or finer; ratio a touch higher (1:16-1:17)

flavor.zh: 风味干净清晰、酸度明亮

adjustment.zh: 稍低水温或稍粗研磨防过萃;粉水比略低(1:15-1:16)
adjustment.en: slightly lower temp or coarser to avoid over-extraction; ratio lower (1:15-1:16)

adjustment.zh: 中等参数,按蜜处理程度微调
adjustment.en: mid parameters, tune by honey level

adjustment.zh: 通常降水温(88-92C)避免过度提取发酵风味
adjustment.en: often lower temp (88-92C) to avoid pulling too much funk

flavor.zh: 风味独特强烈、发酵感、酒香
